user_agents.name: OAI-SearchBot
user_agents.purpose: Search results in ChatGPT's search features
user_agents.scope: Surface websites in ChatGPT search answers; opted-out sites excluded from search but may appear as navigational links
user_agents.opt_out: Disallow OAI-SearchBot in robots.txt file

user_agents.name: OAI-AdsBot
user_agents.purpose: Validate safety of web pages submitted as ads on ChatGPT
user_agents.scope: Only visits pages submitted as ads; content used for relevance determination, not for training generative AI models

user_agents.name: GPTBot
user_agents.purpose: Training generative AI foundation models
user_agents.scope: Crawl content for training foundation models; disallow indicates content should not be used in model training
user_agents.opt_out: Disallow GPTBot in site's robots.txt file

user_agents.name: ChatGPT-User
user_agents.purpose: User-triggered actions in ChatGPT and Custom GPTs
user_agents.scope: User-initiated web page visits and external application interactions via GPT Actions; not automatic web crawling
user_agents.opt_out: robots.txt rules may not apply as actions are user-initiated

user_agents.name: ClaudeBot
user_agents.purpose: Collect web content for AI model training and development
user_agents.scope: General web crawl for training data collection
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: ClaudeBot / Disallow: / in robots.txt; honors Crawl-delay directive

user_agents.name: Claude-User
user_agents.purpose: Support Claude AI users accessing websites during interactive queries
user_agents.scope: User-triggered fetch for live web responses to user questions
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Claude-User / Disallow: / in robots.txt to prevent retrieval

user_agents.name: Claude-SearchBot
user_agents.purpose: Improve search result quality and relevance for users
user_agents.scope: Web crawl to analyze content for search optimization and indexing
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Claude-SearchBot / Disallow: / in robots.txt to prevent indexing

user_agents.name: Googlebot
user_agents.purpose: Building Google Search index and other product crawls
user_agents.scope: General web crawl for Google Search, Images, Video, News, Discover
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Googlebot / Disallow: / in robots.txt

user_agents.name: Googlebot-Image
user_agents.purpose: Building Google Images index and image-related features
user_agents.scope: Crawls images, logos, and favicons for Google Search and related products
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Googlebot-Image / Disallow: / in robots.txt

user_agents.name: Googlebot-Video
user_agents.purpose: Building video index for Google Search and related products
user_agents.scope: Crawls video content for video-related Google Search features
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Googlebot-Video / Disallow: / in robots.txt

user_agents.name: Googlebot-News
user_agents.purpose: Crawling content for Google News product
user_agents.scope: Crawls news content for news.google.com and Google News app
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Googlebot-News / Disallow: / in robots.txt

user_agents.name: Storebot-Google
user_agents.purpose: Crawling product information for Google Shopping
user_agents.scope: Crawls product data for Google Shopping surfaces and Shopping tab
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Storebot-Google / Disallow: / in robots.txt

user_agents.name: Google-InspectionTool
user_agents.purpose: Testing and inspection for Google Search Console tools
user_agents.scope: Fetches content for Rich Result Test and URL inspection in Search Console
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Google-InspectionTool / Disallow: / in robots.txt

user_agents.name: GoogleOther
user_agents.purpose: Generic crawling for various Google product teams and research
user_agents.scope: One-off crawls for internal R&D and publicly accessible content fetching
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: GoogleOther / Disallow: / in robots.txt

user_agents.name: GoogleOther-Image
user_agents.purpose: Generic image crawling optimized for various Google product teams
user_agents.scope: Fetches publicly accessible image URLs for internal Google research
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: GoogleOther-Image / Disallow: / in robots.txt

user_agents.name: GoogleOther-Video
user_agents.purpose: Generic video crawling optimized for various Google product teams
user_agents.scope: Fetches publicly accessible video URLs for internal Google research
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: GoogleOther-Video / Disallow: / in robots.txt

user_agents.name: Google-CloudVertexBot
user_agents.purpose: Crawling for building Vertex AI Agents as requested by site owners
user_agents.scope: Crawls content for Vertex AI Agents as requested by site owners
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Google-CloudVertexBot / Disallow: / in robots.txt

user_agents.name: Google-Extended
user_agents.purpose: Training future Gemini models and grounding responses with search results
user_agents.scope: Controls use of crawled content for Gemini training and grounding
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Google-Extended / Disallow: / in robots.txt

user_agents.name: PerplexityBot
user_agents.purpose: Surface and link websites in search results on Perplexity
user_agents.scope: Search result indexing for Perplexity search engine
user_agents.opt_out: Disallow PerplexityBot in robots.txt file or block published IP ranges

user_agents.name: Perplexity-User
user_agents.purpose: Support user actions within Perplexity for answering questions
user_agents.scope: User-triggered web page fetches to provide accurate answers to user queries
user_agents.opt_out: Configure WAF or IP filtering; generally ignores robots.txt rules since user-triggered

user_agents.name: Applebot
user_agents.purpose: Search indexing for Spotlight, Siri, and Safari across Apple ecosystem
user_agents.scope: General web crawl for search discovery in Apple products and services
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Applebot / Disallow: / in robots.txt; also respects Googlebot rules if Applebot not specified

user_agents.name: Applebot-Extended
user_agents.purpose: Training data collection for Apple foundation models and generative AI features
user_agents.scope: Content classification for Apple Intelligence, Services, and Developer Tools training
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Applebot-Extended / Disallow: / in robots.txt file

user_agents.name: iTMS
user_agents.purpose: iTunes/Apple Podcasts content crawling and indexing
user_agents.scope: Registered content URLs on Apple Podcasts only; does not follow robots.txt

user_agents.name: FacebookExternalHit
user_agents.purpose: Crawl shared content on Meta apps (Facebook, Instagram, Messenger) to gather title, description, and thumbnail
user_agents.scope: Content shared on Meta family of apps; might bypass robots.txt for security/integrity checks
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: facebookexternalhit / Disallow: / in robots.txt; may bypass for malware/security checks

user_agents.name: Meta-WebIndexer
user_agents.purpose: Improve Meta AI search result quality and relevance by analyzing online content
user_agents.scope: General web crawl to enhance Meta AI search capabilities
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: meta-webindexer / Disallow: / in robots.txt; up to 24 hours to take effect

user_agents.name: Meta-ExternalAds
user_agents.purpose: Crawl web for advertising and business-related products and services improvement
user_agents.scope: General web crawl for advertising and business purposes
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: meta-externalads / Disallow: / in robots.txt; up to 24 hours to take effect

user_agents.name: Meta-ExternalAgent
user_agents.purpose: Training foundation AI models and improving products by indexing content directly
user_agents.scope: General web crawl for AI training and product improvement
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: meta-externalagent / Disallow: / in robots.txt; up to 24 hours to take effect

user_agents.name: Meta-ExternalFetcher
user_agents.purpose: Fetch individual links at user request to evaluate and improve agentic AI capabilities
user_agents.scope: User-triggered fetch for live responses; may bypass robots.txt for user-requested fetches
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: meta-externalfetcher / Disallow: / in robots.txt; may bypass for user-triggered requests

user_agents.name: Copilot
user_agents.purpose: AI training and live response generation for Copilot features
user_agents.scope: Web crawl for Copilot features in Microsoft products
user_agents.opt_out: Robots.txt Disallow rule for user-agent: Copilot or via robots.txt User-agent: Copilot / Disallow: /

user_agents.name: BingBot
user_agents.purpose: Search indexing for Bing search results
user_agents.scope: General web crawl for Bing search index
user_agents.opt_out: Robots.txt Disallow rule or User-agent: Bingbot / Disallow: /

user_agents.name: Amazonbot
user_agents.purpose: Improve products and services, train Amazon AI models
user_agents.scope: General web crawl for product and service improvement
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Amazonbot / Disallow: / in robots.txt or contact amazonbot@amazon.com

user_agents.name: Amzn-SearchBot
user_agents.purpose: Improve search experiences in Amazon products and services
user_agents.scope: Crawls content eligible to appear in Alexa, Rufus search experiences
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Amzn-SearchBot / Disallow: / in robots.txt or contact amazonbot@amazon.com

user_agents.name: Amzn-User
user_agents.purpose: Support user actions like responding to Alexa queries with live information
user_agents.scope: User-triggered fetch for live responses to customer queries
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Amzn-User / Disallow: / in robots.txt or contact amazonbot@amazon.com

user_agents.name: CCBot/2.0
user_agents.purpose: Web crawling for Common Crawl dataset collection
user_agents.scope: General web crawl, respects robots.txt and crawl-delay directives
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: CCBot / Disallow: / in robots.txt file

user_agents.name: CCBot/1.0
user_agents.purpose: Legacy web crawling for Common Crawl dataset collection
user_agents.scope: General web crawl, respects robots.txt and crawl-delay directives
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: CCBot / Disallow: / in robots.txt file

user_agents.name: Verified AI Crawlers (Generic)
user_agents.purpose: Training data collection and web indexing
user_agents.scope: General web crawl subject to robots.txt and HTTP 402 Payment Required responses
user_agents.opt_out: robots.txt disallow rules; HTTP 402 Payment Required; Cloudflare Redirects for AI Training

user_agents.name: Agentic Actors (AI agents/browsers)
user_agents.purpose: Autonomous agent operations and automated interactions
user_agents.scope: User-triggered and autonomous agent requests across web; accounted for ~10% of traffic in March 2026
user_agents.opt_out: robots.txt rules; Agent Readiness Score configuration; site-level policies
